---
jupyter: python3
format: 
  pdf:
    echo: false
    geometry:
      - top=5mm        
      - left=5mm
      - right=5mm
      - bottom=20mm
      - headheight=35mm 
      - headsep=5mm 
      - includehead=true 
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          \usepackage{tabularx}
          \usepackage{multirow}
          \usepackage{graphicx}
          \usepackage{xcolor}
          \usepackage{fancyhdr}
          \usepackage{lastpage}
          \usepackage{multicol}
          \usepackage{ifthen}

          \pagestyle{fancy}
          \fancyhf{} 
          \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
          \newcounter{score}
          
          \fancyhead[C]{
            \noindent
            \bgroup
            \def\arraystretch{1.4}
            \begin{tabularx}{\textwidth}{|p{5.5cm}|p{1.8cm}|X|p{1.2cm}|p{1.8cm}|}
            \hline
            \multirow{5}{5.5cm}{
                \vspace*{1mm}
                \includegraphics[width=4.5cm]{logo} \\
                \fontsize{6pt}{7pt}\selectfont
                \textbf{CIVIL \& ENVIRONMENTAL ENGINEERING,}\\
                SKEMPTON BUILDING, IMPERIAL COLLEGE\\
                LONDON, SOUTH KENSINGTON CAMPUS,\\
                LONDON SW7 2AZ.\\[3mm]
                \normalsize\textbf{CALCULATION SHEET}
            }
            & \textbf{Job No.} & & \textbf{Sheet} & \textbf{Ref} \\ \cline{2-5}
            & \textbf{Job Title} & Steel Design Coursework & \multicolumn{2}{l|}{\thepage\ of \pageref{LastPage}} \\ \cline{2-5}
            & \multicolumn{4}{p{\dimexpr\textwidth-5.5cm-8\tabcolsep-5\arrayrulewidth\relax}|}{
                \textbf{Subject} \newline
                \vspace*{1mm}
                \centerline{ Lateral Deflection Calculation }
                \vspace*{1mm}
            } \\ \cline{2-5}
            & \multirow{2}{*}{\textbf{Client}} & \textbf{Made by} \quad  Pablo Peng & \multicolumn{2}{l|}{\textbf{Date} \quad 03/03/2026} \\ \cline{3-5}
            & & \textbf{Checked by} \quad  Vincent Chan & \multicolumn{2}{l|}{\textbf{Date}} \\ \hline
            \end{tabularx}
            \egroup
          }
---
\Large 
\linespread{1.4}
\selectfont

```{python}
%precision 2
# Freedom of choice parameters
L = 54
Ac1 = 9000
Ac2 = 9000
Ad = 32100
Lh = 8.25
dfactor = 1.35
ifactor = 1.05
wfactor = 1.5

#Material properties
import math as m
E = 210000

# Height and length of the building
Hr = 4
Hg = 6
H = 8*Hr + Hg

# Dead floor
gt_f = 0.7
gs_f = 3.38
gc_f = 0.5
gste_f = 0.3
gser_f = 1.4
# Impose floor
qpar_f = 1.0
qimp_f = 4.0
qcl = 1.2
Gtyp_f = gt_f + gs_f + gc_f + gste_f + gser_f
Qtyp_f = qpar_f + qimp_f
wtyp_f = dfactor * Gtyp_f + ifactor * Qtyp_f 
# Dead roof
gt_r = 1.0
gs_r = 3.38
gc_r = 0.5
gste_r = 0.2
gser_r = 1.0
# Impose roof
qimp_r = 1.5
Gtyp_r = gt_r + gs_r + gc_r + gste_r + gser_r
Qtyp_r = qimp_r
wtyp_r = dfactor * Gtyp_r + ifactor * Qtyp_r
# Wind load
wk = 1.3
```

#
# Floor Loads
\begin{multicols}{2}
\begin{description}
    \item[]$G_{tiles}$ = `{python} gt_f` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$G_{steel}$ = `{python} gste_f` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$G_{ceiling}$ = `{python} gc_f` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$G_{slab}$ = `{python} gs_f` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$G_{services}$ = `{python} gser_f` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$Q_{partitions}$ = `{python} qpar_f` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$Q_{imposed}$ = `{python} qimp_f` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$Q_{cladding}$ = `{python} qcl` $kN/m^2$
\end{description}
\end{multicols}

# Roof Loads
\begin{multicols}{2}
\begin{description}
    \item[]$G_{tiles}$ = `{python} gt_r` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$G_{steel}$ = `{python} gste_r` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$G_{ceiling}$ = `{python} gc_r` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$G_{slab}$ = `{python} gs_r` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$G_{services}$ = `{python} gser_r` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]$Q_{imposed}$ = `{python} qimp_r` $kN/m^2$
\end{description}
\end{multicols}

# Wind Load and load combination
\begin{description}
    \item[]$W_k$ = `{python} wk`
    \item[]Partial factor for Dead load, $\gamma_d$ = `{python} dfactor`
    \item[]Partial factor for imposed load, $\gamma_i$ = `{python} ifactor`
    \item[]Partial factor for wind load, $\gamma_w$ = `{python} wfactor`
\end{description}

{{< pagebreak >}}

#
\begin{description}
    \item[]Load combination for floor, $W_{typ, f}$ = $\gamma_d \cdot G_{typ, f} + \gamma_i \cdot Q_{typ, f} + \gamma_w \cdot W_k$ = `{python} wtyp_f` $kN/m^2$
    \item[]Load combination for roof, $W_{typ, r}$ = $\gamma_d \cdot G_{typ, r} + \gamma_i \cdot Q_{typ, r} + \gamma_w \cdot W_k$ = `{python} wtyp_r` $kN/m^2$
\end{description}

```{python}
# wind load per floor
wtotal = wfactor*L*H*wk
Fb = wtotal/4
wudl = Fb/H
wr = wudl*Hr*0.5
wf1 = wudl*Hr
wf2 = wudl*Hg

# floor load
Perimeter = 54+45+60+m.sqrt(15**2+54**2)
A = (60+45)*54/2
Fcld = qcl*H*(54+45+60+56.04)
Fstorey = wtyp_f*A + Fcld
EHF1 = 0.25*0.005*Fstorey
Froof = wtyp_r*A
EHF2 = 0.25*0.005*Froof

#load per floor
ff = wf1 + EHF1
fg = wf2 + EHF1
fr = wr + EHF2
```

# Wind load per floor
\begin{description}
    \item[]Height of the building, $H$ = `{python} H` $m$
    \item[]Length of the building, $L$ = `{python} L` $m$
    \item[]Total area of the wind face, $A_{wf}$ = `{python} L` $\times$ `{python} H` = `{python} L*H` $m^2$
    \item[]Total Wind load, $W_{total}$ = $\gamma_w \times A_{wf} \times W_k$  = `{python} wtotal` $kN$
    \item[]Wind load per bracing, $F_b$ = $W_{total}/4$ = `{python} Fb` $kN$
    \item[]Wind load per meter, $W_{udl}$ = $F_b/H$ = `{python} wudl` $kN/m$
    \item[]Wind load on roof, $W_r$ = $0.5 \times W_{udl} \times `{python} Hr`$ = `{python} wr` $kN$
    \item[]Wind load on 4 meter floor, $W_{f}$ = $W_{udl} \times `{python} Hr`$ = `{python} wf1` $kN$
    \item[]Wind load on 6 meter ground floor, $W_{g}$ = $W_{udl} \times `{python} Hg`$ = `{python} wf2` $kN$
\end{description}

# Dead and imposed load per floor
\begin{description}
    \item[]Perimeter of the floor = `{python} Perimeter` $m$
    \item[]Cladding load, $F_{cladding}$ = $q_{cl} \times H \times Perimeter$ = `{python} Fcld` $kN$
    \item[]Area of floor, A = `{python} A` $m^2$
\end{description}

{{< pagebreak >}}

#
\begin{description}
    \item[]Total floor load, $F_{storey}$ = $W_{typ, f}\cdot A + F_{cladding}$ = `{python} Fstorey` $kN$
    \item[]Total roof load, $F_{roof}$ = $W_{typ, r}\cdot A$ = `{python} Froof` $kN$
    \item[]Equivalent horizontal force on floor, $EHF_f$ = $F_{storey} \cdot 0.25 \cdot 0.005$ = `{python} EHF1` $kN$
    \item[]Equivalent horizontal force on roof, $EHF_r$ = $F_{roof} \cdot 0.25 \cdot 0.005$ = `{python} EHF2` $kN$
\end{description}

# Total load per floor
\begin{description}
    \item[]Total load on 4 meter floor, $F_f$ = $W_{f} + EHF_f$ = `{python} ff` $kN$
    \item[]Total load on 6 meter ground floor, $F_g$ = $W_{g} + EHF_f$ = `{python} fg` $kN$
    \item[]Total load on roof, $F_r$ = $W_r + EHF_r$ = `{python} fr` $kN$
\end{description}

```{python}
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import math
def sci(value):
    exp_num = math.floor(math.log10(abs(value)))
    base = value / (10 ** exp_num)
    return value, base, exp_num

# Define storey
storey = np.array([9,8,7,6,5,4,3,2,1])

# Nodal force list
Nodal_forces = []
nodel_initial = fr
for i in range(1, 10):
    if i <= 8:
        Nodal_forces.append(nodel_initial)
        nodel_initial = ff
    else:
        nodel_initial = fg
        Nodal_forces.append(nodel_initial)
nodal_force = np.array(Nodal_forces)

# Total shear loadlist
Total_shear = []
shear_initial = fr
for i in range(1, 10):
    if i <= 8:
        Total_shear.append(shear_initial)
        shear_initial += ff
    else:
        shear_initial += fg-ff
        Total_shear.append(shear_initial)
total_shear = np.array(Total_shear)

# Total axial load list
Total_load = []
load_initial = Froof/4
for i in range(1, 10):
    Total_load.append(load_initial)
    load_initial += Fstorey/4
total_load = np.array(Total_load)

# Diagonal column geometry
Hs = np.array([4,4,4,4,4,4,4,4,6])
Ld = np.sqrt(Hs**2 + Lh**2)

# Moment
moment_amr = 38 + 4 -np.cumsum(Hs)
M = np.sum(total_shear * moment_amr)
I, Ib, Ie = sci(Ac1*(Lh*1e3)**2/2)
phi, phib, phie = sci(M*1e6/(E*I))
a = 9 - storey
```

# Parameters for deflection calculation
\begin{description}
    \item[]Interstorey height = $H_s$, 
    \item[]Horizontal distance between vertical columns = $L_h$ = `{python} Lh` $m$
    \item[]Elastic modulus, $E$ = `{python} E` $MPa$
    \item[]Area of the diagonal column, $A_d$ = `{python} Ad` $mm^2$
    \item[]Area of vertical column, $A_{c}$ = `{python} Ac1` $mm^2$
    \item[]Length of the diagonal column of floors, $L_{d,other}$ = $\sqrt{4^2 + L_h^2} $ = `{python} Ld[0]` $m$
\end{description}

{{< pagebreak >}}

#
\begin{description}
    \item[]Length of diagonal column of ground floor, $L_{d,ground}$ = $\sqrt{6^2 + L_h^2}`$ = `{python} Ld[-1]` $m$
    \item[] Resultant moment, $M$ = $\sum{F_i \cdot H_i}$ =`{python} M` $kN\cdot m$
    \item[] Moment of inertia of the vertical columns, $I$ = $0.5 \cdot A_c \cdot L_h^2$ = `{python} Ib` $\times 10^{`{python} Ie`}$ $mm^4$
    \item[] Flexural deflection coefficient, $\phi$ = $\frac{M}{EI}$ = `{python} phib` $\times 10^{`{python} phie`}$ $mm$
\end{description}

# Result 1:
```{python}
#| output: asis
import pandas as pd
n = len(storey)
delta_sh = total_shear*Ld*1e6/(Ad*E)*(Ld/Lh)
delta_f = 1e6*(phi*Hs**2)/(6*n)*(3*n**2 - 3*a**2 - 3*a - 1)
delta_t = delta_sh + delta_f
a_cr = (total_shear*Hs*1e3)/(total_load*delta_t)
# Build one table from all result arrays.
df = pd.DataFrame({
    'Storey' : storey,
    r"$H_s$ (mm)": Hs,
    r"$F$ (kN)": nodal_force,
    r"$V_{ed}$ (kN)": total_shear,
    r"$N_{ed}$ (kN)": total_load,
    r"$\delta_{sh}$ (mm)": delta_sh,
    r"$\delta_f$ (mm)": delta_f,
    r"$\delta_t$ (mm)": delta_t,
    r"$\alpha_{cr}$": a_cr
})

# Generate LaTeX table with custom formatting
latex_table = df.to_latex(
    index=False,
    float_format="%.2f",
    column_format="|c|c|c|c|c|c|c|c|c|c|",
    escape=False
)

# Wrap with small font and tight spacing
print(r"\normalfont")
print(r"\setlength{\tabcolsep}{8pt}")
print(latex_table)
```
Notes: 
\begin{multicols}{2}
\begin{description}
    \item[1.]$\delta_{sh} = \frac{V_{ed}L_d}{A_dE}\cdot(\frac{L_d}{L_h})^2$  
    \item[2.]$\delta_f = \frac{\phi H_s^2}{6n}(3n^2 - 3a^2 - 3a - 1)$  
    \item[3.]n = 9, for 9 storeys 
    \item[4.]a = 9 - storey number
    \item[5.]$\delta_t = \delta_{sh} + \delta_f$ 
    \item[6.]$\alpha_{cr} = \frac{V_{ed}H_s}{N_{ed}\delta_t}$ 
\end{description}
\end{multicols}
